name: @bbx-audio/crate
description: Cross-platform DJ library manager with music discovery, track analysis, and USB export

scripts.dev: cross-env CRATE_ENV=development tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json -- --release --features desktop --features devtools
scripts.build:production: cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.prod.conf.json --features desktop
scripts.build:staging: cross-env CRATE_ENV=staging tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.staging.conf.json -- --features desktop --features devtools
scripts.dev:ios: yarn ios:plist:write && node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform ios --channel dev && node scripts/write-ios-bundle-id.mjs --channel dev && cross-env CRATE_ENV=development TAURI_DEV_HOST=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0) tauri ios dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json --features mobile
scripts.dev:android: node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform android --channel dev && cross-env CRATE_ENV=development TAURI_DEV_HOST=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0) tauri android dev --features mobile
scripts.build:ios: yarn ios:plist:write && node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform ios --channel prod && node scripts/write-ios-bundle-id.mjs --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri ios build --config src-tauri/tauri.prod.conf.json --features mobile
scripts.build:ios:appstore: yarn ios:plist:write && node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform ios --channel prod && node scripts/write-ios-bundle-id.mjs --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri ios build --export-method app-store-connect --features mobile
scripts.build:ios:adhoc: yarn ios:plist:write && node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform ios --channel prod && node scripts/write-ios-bundle-id.mjs --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri ios build --export-method ad-hoc --features mobile
scripts.build:android: node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform android --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri android build --features mobile
scripts.build:android:apk: node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform android --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri android build --apk --features mobile
scripts.build:android:aab: node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform android --channel prod && cross-env CRATE_ENV=production tauri android build --aab --features mobile
scripts.build:staging:ios: yarn ios:plist:write && node scripts/write-mobile-icons.mjs --platform ios --channel staging && node scripts/write-ios-bundle-id.mjs --channel staging && cross-env CRATE_ENV=staging tauri ios build --config src-tauri/tauri.staging.conf.json --features mobile && node scripts/install-ios-device.mjs --channel staging
